name: hl7-ace-agent-layer
description: Agentic AI orchestration layer for IBM ACE HL7 Enablement Starter Kit

scripts.demo: curl -s http://localhost:4000/demo | node -e "const d=require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8'); const r=JSON.parse(d); r.results.forEach(m=>{ console.log('\n---'); console.log(m.summary); });"
